summary: Frontend-only validation of /inscricao.html for Section 4 (Escolaridade), Section 5 (Contatos) + regression on Sections 1 and 3. All 7 requirements PASS on the deployed preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: Phone mask formatter appears to rely on user keystrokes (input event with single-char changes). When a value is set programmatically via .value= + dispatchEvent('input') the mask does not re-format the string (observed raw '1133334444' instead of '(11) 3333-4444'). This is fine for real user typing (which is what matters for the review), but the mask function should also be robust to paste events — consider always calling maskFn(el.value) inside the input handler regardless of how the change arrived.
Positive: on Tipo change from Celular→Fixo the phone input's aria-label correctly adapts from 'Telefone celular' to 'Telefone fixo' — the adaptation script is working.

Positive: CEP mask + ViaCEP autofill works end-to-end (typing '50030230' → formats to '50030-230' → fetches → fills Endereço='Cais do Apolo', Bairro='Recife', Cidade='Recife', Estado='PE'). Invalid CEP '99999999' correctly shows 'CEP não encontrado. Preencha o endereço manualmente.' message.
Positive: IBGE municipalities fetch works: selecting Brasil→Pernambuco loads 186 municipalities including 'Abreu e Lima', 'Afogados da Ingazeira', 'Recife'.

File public/inscricao.html is 594 lines but ~93% is a single minified Quasar CSS blob on one line. Recommend externalising CSS to /assets/quasar.min.css for readability/cacheability (non-blocking, mentioned in previous iteration too).
seed_data_creation: None — set values at runtime only (Brasil→PE→CEP 50030230 / 99999999).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static page /inscricao.html served via CRA public/. All transformations done by inline <script> at end of body on DOMContentLoaded — wait ≥3s after networkidle for scripts to convert combobox→<select>, bind masks, etc. Key verified facts: Escolaridade is a real <select> with 7 real options + empty; Tipo phone is <select> with ['Tel. Fixo','Tel. Celular']; phone input label auto-switches between 'Telefone celular' (maxLength=15) and 'Telefone fixo'; no 'Confirme o e-mail' input/label; no 'Adicionar' buttons + 'Clique no botão caso deseje adicionar outros contatos/endereços' phrases; 199 países, 28 estados incl. Pernambuco, 186 municípios PE via IBGE async; CEP mask '00000-000' (maxLength=9) + ViaCEP autofill on 50030230, error msg on 99999999. To test phone/select mask changes, prefer page.type() with per-char delay over programmatic .value=; the mask formatter reacts to keystroke-level input events.
rca of the issue: N/A — all reported bugs already fixed by main agent. Verified via headless browser (Playwright) on the public preview URL.
